headline: Kraft Heinz Unilever Talks End But Big Portfolio Questions Remain
summary: Kraft Heinz (NasdaqGS:KHC) held high-level merger talks with Unilever about combining their food businesses. The discussions have now concluded without a deal, and both companies are declining to provide further details. The talks add a new dimension to recent news that had focused on product launches, partnerships, and plant investments at Kraft Heinz. Kraft Heinz sits at the center of the global packaged foods sector, with a portfolio of household brands that reach supermarkets and...
